MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS, FILED ONLY. SENT TO COURT FOR ORDER.
WROTE TO THE COURT STATING A WILLINGNESS TO ACCEPT $100 PER MO. THEREFORE, PURSUANT TO STIP. PAYMENTS ARE ORDERED IN THE AMT OF $100 PER MO BEGINNING
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PAFFORD, BRET SCOTT,JR. HEARING SET FOR JUL-05-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLINGSON, GAIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAFFORD, BRET SCOTT,JR. ROSELL, CHRISTINE $421.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $541.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
